name: AlertDialog
description: Blocking modal decision surface for confirmations, warnings, destructive actions, and other choices that require an explicit response.

props.name: intent
props.description: Semantic intent that controls icon color and action button intent.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: Layout mode for desktop or stacked mobile compositions.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the native dialog is shown with showModal().

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional leading decorative icon. Use lucide-react icons.

props.name: title
props.description: Dialog title used as the accessible name when present.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional supporting text used as the accessible description when present.

props.name: primaryAction
props.description: Primary action slot, usually a filled Button.

props.name: secondaryAction
props.description: Secondary action slot, usually an outline Button.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when native cancel, such as Escape, requests the dialog to close.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name for the root dialog.

states.rationale: AlertDialog root has controlled open/closed modal state and layout/intent attributes, but it does not define hover, pressed, focus, selected, or disabled visual states. Interactive states are owned by Button children in the action slots.

keyboard.Escape: Triggers native cancel, prevents uncontrolled close, and calls onClose
keyboard.Tab: Moves through focusable action children while native modal dialog containment is active
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Moves backward through focusable action children while native modal dialog containment is active
keyboard.Enter/Space: Activates focused Button actions through native button behavior

accessibility.focusManagement: Native showModal() places the dialog in the modal top layer and provides modal focus containment; action children follow natural tab order

propertyMapping.note: Code may omit breakpoint to use responsive CSS auto-detect.
Visibility toggle for the leading decorative icon slot.
Figma text override maps to the code title string.
Figma text override maps to the code description string.
Figma boolean controls supporting text visibility. Code uses the description prop for both content and visibility.
Figma controls the action row directly. Code derives row visibility from primaryAction or secondaryAction presence.
Figma-only arbitrary content slot toggle. Code does not expose a general content slot.
Figma-only slot target. Code does not expose a general content slot.

useWhen: Confirming a destructive or irreversible action
Asking users to approve or reject an important operation
Requiring acknowledgement before task progress can continue
Explaining an error state that blocks the workflow
Presenting one focused decision with one primary resolution path
doNotUseFor: Temporary notifications that disappear automatically - use Toast when available
Complex forms, long content, or multi-step workflows - use Dialog
Low-priority confirmations that do not justify interruption

knownDeviations.description: Figma exposes slot and slot-content for arbitrary inserted content. Code does not expose a general content slot; it supports title, description, icon, primary action, and secondary action only.
Figma examples are static panels for documentation. Code uses native modal dialog behavior through showModal().
